title: Trump's Gaza Peace Board Facing Cash Crunch, Stalling Implementation
detail: Trump's Board of Peace, the US-backed body tasked with implementing a post-war Gaza governance plan, is reportedly facing a serious cash crunch that is stalling implementation of the US-backed Gaza plan. The financial shortfall is undermining the board's operational capacity and delaying key milestones in the US-envisioned peace framework. The development raises fresh doubts about the viability of the US plan at a time when Gaza's humanitarian crisis remains acute and Phase 2 negotiations remain deadlocked.
